evals.prompt: Audit https://example.com for AI search visibility. Check the HTML size, JavaScript dependency, and hedge density. Provide a GEO readiness report with scores for technical visibility and content authority.
evals.expected_output: A structured GEO audit report covering HTML payload size (target <1MB), JS dependency risk assessment, hedge density score (target <0.2%), and recommendations for improving AI crawler visibility.

assertions.text: The response discusses HTML payload size and mentions the 1MB threshold for AI crawler compatibility.
The response explains hedge density scoring and identifies hedge words that reduce AI search ranking confidence.
The response distinguishes between rendering crawlers (GPTBot) and non-rendering crawlers (ClaudeBot) and their implications.

evals.prompt: Generate an AgentFacts schema for a SaaS product at myapp.io that supports text and image capabilities with OAuth2 authentication. Follow the NANDA protocol.
evals.expected_output: A valid NANDA-compliant AgentFacts JSON schema placed at /.well-known/agent-facts with proper context URL, agent name, endpoints, capabilities (text, image), and authentication (oauth2) fields.

assertions.text: The generated schema includes the @context field pointing to nanda.dev namespace.
The schema specifies both text and image modalities in the capabilities section.
The response indicates the schema should be placed at /.well-known/agent-facts path.
